Name: The Spence School
Tagline: The Spence School, on the Upper East Side in New York City, is among the top all-girls K-12 schools in the world. Academic excellence is our top priority.
City: Upper East Side, New York, US
About: The Spence School is renowned for its rigorous academic curriculum and commitment to empowering young women as leaders. Located in New York City, it fosters a nurturing environment that emphasizes intellectual curiosity and personal growth.
Philosophy: Spence prioritizes a holistic education, integrating arts, athletics, and academics to develop well-rounded individuals. Its teaching approach encourages critical thinking, creativity, and collaboration, preparing students for success in a global society.
Outcomes: Spence graduates consistently gain admission to top-tier universities, including Ivy League schools, and excel in various fields. The school boasts a strong track record in academic competitions and has a distinguished network of accomplished alumni.
Admissions: Prospective students must complete an online application, submit standardized test scores (ISEE or SSAT), and participate in an interview. The admissions process begins in the fall, with decisions typically released in the spring.
Quote: #1 SO MANY WAYS to be YouDeveloping a strong voice that echoes who you are and what matters to you.
AppDeadline: for financial aid application is December 1, 2025

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Spence School faculty includes Ivy League graduates and specialists with advanced degrees in their fields, ensuring a high level of expertise in both academic and extracurricular coaching.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Spence offers comprehensive counseling services and a robust advisory program to support students' mental and emotional health, fostering a strong sense of community and personal growth.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum includes advanced placement courses in sciences, humanities, and arts, with a focus on interdisciplinary learning and critical thinking through signature electives like 'Global Perspectives' and 'Creative Writing.'
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Spence graduates boast a 95% acceptance rate to top-tier universities, including Ivy League schools, with alumni excelling in fields such as law, medicine, and the arts.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Spence School features state-of-the-art science labs, a performing arts theater, and a modern athletic complex, providing students with exceptional resources for both academic and extracurricular pursuits.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is closely monitored through trimester reports and regular parent-teacher conferences, supported by NYSAIS accreditation and ERB assessments to maintain educational excellence.
